titleStmt.title: SII 26.655: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 655. (A.R. No. 614 of 1909.) TIRUCHCHIRAI, KUMBAKONAM TALUK, THANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: South wall of the central shrine in the same temple.

p.hi: Śaka 1566, Tāraṇa, Kārttigai 17, Saturday, Rōhiṇī = 1644 A.D., November 16. The nakshatra was Svātī.

summary.p: This inscription records a gift of 3 and 8 mā (i.e., 68 mā) of puñjai land in Gaṅgādharanallūr providing mask, pītāmbaram, private bathing and scents to smear with, to the image of the god Sāranāthasvāmi and a gift of 1/2 (10 mā) of nañjai land (probably in the same place) in favour of the shrine of Āḻvār, by a certain Gōvindadāsaṉ, for the merit of the ruler Vijayarāghavabhūpālaṉ, It is stated that the gift-land was given away to a certain Sugandam Appaṅgār with the stipulation that he and his progenies should carry out the object of the gift.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīsāranādhādhanmaḥ svastiśrī śakābdam 1000 5 100 6 10 6 Itiṉmel cellāniṉṟa tāruṇavaruṣam kāttikai mātam 10 7 nāḷ cani rohiṇi ṉāḷ śrīsāranāthasvāmikku Aṅgipītāmparamum cāttiviccu Ekānta tirumañcaṉattukkum cāntukāppukkum Āḻvār sannidhikkum vijayarāghavabhupālaṉ puṇṇiyamāka govintadāsaṉ keṅkātaranallūril poliviṭṭāka samarppitta puñcainilam muṉṟe Eṭṭumā Āḻvār sannidhikku samarppitta nañcai nilam Arai Āka nilam
muṉṟe mukkāle muṉṟu māvum cukantam Appaṅkār pāricamāka kaṭṭaḷaiyiṭṭu dhārāpūrvvakamāka dharmma śāsanam paṇṇi samarppitta paṭiyiṉāle Ācandrārkkasthāyiyāputrapautraparamparaiyāka sāranādhasvāmikke kaimkaryyam paṇṇikkoṇṭu cukattile yirukkavum Inta dharmmattukku Ārākilum vighnam paṇṇiṉāl keṅkaik karaiyile kārām pacuvai koṉṟa doṣattile pokavum
Digital edition of SII 26.655 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
